summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MomCareAI Medication Reminder System (Amma AI) - all new backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly. Tested reminder CRUD operations, Amma AI responses, adherence tracking, prescription-to-reminder auto-creation, and full UI integration.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reminder - returns reminders list
Backend: POST /api/reminder - create reminder with medicine/dosage/time
Backend: GET /api/reminder/adherence - returns adherence stats with Amma message
Backend: POST /api/reminder/amma - all actions (greeting, taken, not_taken, health_check)
Backend: GET /api/reminder/check - returns due and upcoming reminders
Backend: POST /api/reminder/{id}/log - mark reminder as taken with Amma response
Backend: DELETE /api/reminder/{id} - deactivate reminder
Backend: POST /api/prescription/analyze - auto-creates reminders in DB
Frontend: Navigate to /reminders page with Amma greeting
Frontend: Add Reminder dialog opens and creates reminders
Frontend: Reminders page tabs (My Reminders and Adherence)
Frontend: Prescription page shows 'Reminders auto-created' banner
Frontend: Dashboard shows Med Adherence stat card (100%)
Frontend: Sidebar has Reminders nav link with Bell icon
Frontend: Mobile nav includes Reminders link
Frontend: Chat regression test - existing feature working
Integration: Prescription analysis auto-creates reminders
Integration: Reminder actions trigger Amma responses
Integration: Adherence tracking updates correctly
Integration: Mobile responsive navigation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed including 8 new reminder system tests)
success_percentage.reminder_system: 100% (all CRUD operations, Amma AI, adherence tracking working)
